contentProfile.tagline: Elevate Your Health. Elevate Your Life.

coreServices.name: Chiropractic Adjustments
coreServices.description: Personalized spinal adjustments to restore alignment, reduce pain, and improve nervous system function.

subServices.name: Pediatric Chiropractic
subServices.description: Gentle, safe chiropractic care specifically designed for infants, children, and teens.

subServices.name: Prenatal Chiropractic
subServices.description: Specialized adjustments for expecting mothers to support a healthy pregnancy and easier delivery.

coreServices.name: TMJ Treatment
coreServices.description: Targeted treatment for jaw pain, clicking, headaches, and TMJ dysfunction.

coreServices.name: Sports Chiropractic
coreServices.description: Performance-focused care for athletes — injury recovery, prevention, and peak performance.

coreServices.name: Corrective Care
coreServices.description: Structured care plans to correct postural imbalances and spinal misalignments over time.

storybrand.hero: Families and individuals in Broomfield who want to feel their best but are held back by pain, stiffness, or recurring health issues.
storybrand.problem: Chronic pain, poor posture, and nagging injuries steal your energy and keep you from the activities you love. Quick fixes and medications only mask the symptoms.
storybrand.guide: Dr. Joshua Fearn is a trusted chiropractor who combines expertise with genuine care, helping patients find lasting relief through personalized, whole-body wellness.
storybrand.plan: 1. Schedule your initial consultation. 2. Get a thorough assessment and personalized care plan. 3. Start feeling better with consistent, targeted adjustments.
storybrand.avoidFailure: Without proper care, pain compounds — limiting your mobility, affecting your work, and stealing time from your family.
storybrand.achieveSuccess: Imagine waking up without pain, playing with your kids without limitation, and performing at your peak — that's life elevated.

brandVoice.style: conversational but authoritative — like a trusted friend who happens to be an expert
